title: Replace broken CETA logo with CETA-2.png in navbar, hero, and footer

requirements.summary: Replace all broken CETA Galaxy logo image references in Navigation.tsx, HeroSection.tsx, and Footer.tsx with the uploaded CETA-2.png file, preserving all existing sizing, positioning, and styling
acceptanceCriteria: The CETA Galaxy logo renders correctly (no broken image icon) in the Navigation/navbar
The CETA Galaxy logo renders correctly in the HeroSection
The CETA Galaxy logo renders correctly in the Footer
All other content, layout, and styling from Version 9 remains unchanged

file_operations.description: Save the uploaded CETA-2.png logo file to the frontend assets directory at frontend/public/assets/generated/CETA-2.png to replace the broken CETA Galaxy logo references

Replace the broken CETA Galaxy logo image source path with /assets/generated/CETA-2.png while preserving all existing className, sizing (w-8 h-8 md:w-10 md:h-10), positioning, and styling attributes exactly as they appear in the current version

Replace the broken CETA Galaxy logo image source path with /assets/generated/CETA-2.png while preserving all existing className, sizing, positioning, and styling attributes exactly as they appear in the hero logo row

Replace the broken CETA Galaxy logo image source path with /assets/generated/CETA-2.png while preserving all existing className, sizing (w-12 h-12 md:w-16 md:h-16), positioning, and styling attributes exactly as they appear in the footer dual logo section
